title: CATL says sodium batteries are mainstream-ready, signs massive 60 GWh deal
content:
CATL, the world’s largest battery maker, signed a 60 GWh sodium-ion battery deal with energy storage integrator HyperStrong — the largest sodium-ion battery order ever placed. The three-year agreement is equivalent to half of all energy storage batteries CATL delivered in 2025.

The deal marks what CATL calls proof

title: Geely signs distribution deal to enter Austrian market
content:
First vehicles, including the Geely E5 and Starray EM-i, are expected to hit the Austrian market in the second quarter of 2026.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: BYD raises price for smart driving system amid hardware cost surge
content:
BYD is raising the option price for its God's Eye B smart driving system by over 20%, citing a sharp surge in global storage hardware costs.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: China delivers world's largest car carrier with 10,800-vehicle capacity
content:
The vessel was built by Guangzhou Shipyard International and delivered to South Korea's HMM.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: FAW Hongqi reportedly seeks European manufacturing base via Stellantis partnership
content:
FAW Hongqi is in talks with Stellantis to utilize its Spanish plant to accelerate European expansion.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: Chinese vacuum maker Dreame debuts rocket-boosted electric supercar in US
content:
Dreame's all-electric supercar concept, the Nebula Next 01 Jet Edition, can sprint from 0 to 100 km/h in 0.9 seconds.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: Hyundai's China survival plan hinges on 20 new electrified models
content:
Hyundai is revamping its China product roadmap with the Ioniq brand, planning to launch 20 new NEV models within five years to target a sales volume of 500,000 units by 2030.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: BYD Denza launches second-gen D9 with ultra-fast charging to defend MPV market share
content:
The updated Denza D9 starts at 359,800 yuan ($52,730) and continues to offer both BEV and PHEV options.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: CATL taps Hong Kong market for $5 billion to fund global capacity expansion
content:
CATL prices the largest share offering in Hong Kong this year at a 7% discount.

For details, please visit CnEVPost.

title: Sumitomo Electric flow battery wins Japanese transmission operator HEPCO’s renewables integration tender
content: Sumitomo Electric will supply a vanadium redox flow battery (VRFB) energy storage system to enable grid integration of wind energy in Hokkaido, northern Japan.

title: Sungrow re-files submission for Hong Kong Stock Exchange IPO
content: PV inverter manufacturer and energy storage system integrator Sungrow has re-filed its listing application to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX).

title: GenusPlus wins contract to deliver 800MWh battery storage system in South Australia
content: Australian infrastructure contractor GenusPlus Group has been awarded an AU$110 million (US$78.5 million) engineering, procurement, construction and commissioning contract for the 200MW/800MWh Koolunga battery energy storage system (BESS) in South Australia.

title: Bangladesh launches 495 MW solar tender
content: BPDB has launched a tender for 495 MW of grid-tied solar power projects across 10 sites in Bangladesh, with capacities ranging from 25–100 MW and full private investment required. The bid structure, which places land acquisition and financing risks on developers, has drawn investor concerns over bankability and limited project attractiveness.

title: Bulgaria seeks to revive 864 MW Chaira pumped-storage hydropower plant
content: Supported by Toshiba, Bulgarian utility NEK is working to restart its 864 MW Chaira pumped-storage hydropower plant, the largest of its kind in Southeastern Europe. The facility has been offline since March 2022 following a turbine failure.

title: Longi announces world record efficiency of 28.13% for silicon solar cell
content: Longi claims to have achieved the world's highest efficiency for a silicon solar cell. The result was confirmed by Germany’s Institute for Solar Energy Research Hamelin (ISFH).

title: CATL secures world’s largest sodium-ion battery order with Hyperstrong
content: The two companies announced a 60 GWh supply agreement on Monday, marking a pivotal step in the commercialization of sodium-ion battery technology.

title: Dyness battery container stolen from BM Energy logistics partner, units to be remotely blocked

title: U.S. startup launches PV-driven autonomous pool skimmer
content: The iSkim Ultra utilizes a 24 W monocrystalline solar array and a 10,000 mAh battery to provide 24/7 surface cleaning through an autonomous dual-path navigation system.
